metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4553
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 5a: CACNG7 KD granule cells show a decrease in synaptic channel conductance (to 8.9 ± 0.6 pS, n = 9, P = 0.0093) as compared to WT.

Figure 4: CACNG7 KD does not affect synaptic localisation of AMPA receptors.

Although γ-7 is not essential for synaptic localization of AMPA receptors, the reduction in single-channel conductance suggests that after knockdown of γ-7, the postsynaptic AMPARs may be either TARPless or composed of subunits (such as homomeric GluA2) that give rise to low-conductance channels.. Experimental description: "ONLINE METHODS
Mice. Individual male and female C57BL/6 (WT) and stargazer (stg/stg) mice (postnatal day (P) 4-7) were used to prepare dissociated cultures of cerebellar granule cells."

"After γ-7 knockdown in WT granule cells, we still detected mEPSCs (Fig. 5a), ... "

"These results are in accord with observations from knockout mice showing that the relative expression of TARPs γ-2 and γ-7 influences AMPAR subunit composition"

"For knockdown of TARP γ-7, cells were transfected with a mixture of four shRNA expression constructs against γ-7 (GeneCopoeia, MSH037278-mU6; 2 μg per coverslip). The target sequences used were mouse γ-7 (accession code NM_133189.3), 54 (5'-CTGCGGCCTGCTCCTTGTG-3'), 176 (5'-GGAGAGTCTGCTTCTTTGC-3'), 374 (5'-CTCAGAGGACCATTCTTGC-3') and 500 (5'-CTGAGCAGTACTTTCACTA-3')"
